phrases.intent_en: Is the cloakroom mandatory for my backpack
phrases.text_local: Je šatna povinná pro můj batoh?
phrases.cultural_note: Staff are strict about mandatory cloakroom rules for security.

likely_response.local: Ano, velká zavazadla musí být v šatně.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, large bags must be in the cloakroom.

responses.english: Yes, large bags must be in the cloakroom.
responses.local: Ano, velká zavazadla musí být v šatně.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the combined ticket desk in New Building
phrases.text_local: Kde je pokladna na kombinované lístky v Nové budově?
phrases.cultural_note: Czech staff often use short, direct directions without greetings.

likely_response.translation_en: To the left of the entrance turnstiles.

responses.english: To the left of the entrance turnstiles.

phrases.intent_en: Is the Historic Building open today
phrases.cultural_note: Czechs often specify closing time when confirming opening status.

likely_response.local: Ano, dneska je otevřeno do osmnácti hodin.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, today it's open until 6 PM.

responses.english: Yes, today it's open until 6 PM.
responses.local: Ano, dneska je otevřeno do osmnácti hodin.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the audio guide rental at entrance
phrases.text_local: Kde si můžu půjčit audioprůvodce u vchodu?
phrases.cultural_note: Audio guides are typically rented near the main information point.

likely_response.translation_en: Right behind the information desk on the right.

responses.english: Right behind the information desk on the right.
